title: nephrodium acrostichoides var. incisum
intro: Nephrodium acrostichoides var. incisum, also known as the incised lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Nephrodium acrostichoides var. incisum include its potential to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making teas, infusions, or tinctures, often combining it with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
